center.name: 法国海外部分
center.summary: 法国海外部分是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cocos booby，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cocos booby are found in the East Pacific Ocean, breeding in Costa Rica, Nicaragua, Mexico, French Overseas Territories, Colombia, and the United States. It is also found offshore of Guatemala, El Salvador, and Panama

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Cocos booby are found in the East Pacific Ocean, breeding in Costa Rica, Nicaragua, Mexico, French Overseas Territories, Colombia, and the United States. It is also found offshore of Guatemala, El Salvador, and Panama
